publishedAbstract: - Is sharing a same glusterfs(CNS) volume for multiple application supported?- The desired scenario can be depicted as below. ~~~____________________ | app1---> PVC |---> PV1----\_____________________ | app2---> PVC |---> PV2--\_____________________ \ |____________________| \ \ Project 1 Gluster Volume (Say Vol1)_________________________________________/ / | app1---> PVC |---> PV3--/____________________/ | app2---> PVC |---> PV4----/ |____________________| Project 2 ~~~
publishedTitle: Is sharing same CNS volume with multiple PV supported ?
